rationale: The two papers have strong substantive and methodological overlap: both study ongoing U.S.–Japan buyer–supplier relationships and use a two-wave, second-informant longitudinal design with performance outcomes. The cited paper is a likely theory/method source on contingent relational behavior–performance effects and longitudinal inference, which is plausibly relevant to the citing paper’s inequity/interdependence contingencies and performance tests, so this is not clearly an incidental mention.
